rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL TUBBS et al VS. AMCORD INC( INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR -IN- et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 7, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment is granted. Union Carbide shifted burden of production and plaintiffs failed to raise a triable issue of fact regarding exposure to any asbestos-containing products attributable to Union Carbide. =(302/HEK)
